The course 'Clinical Orientation Sessions' is assigned to all clinical staff. ACN are required to book new clinical staff into the next available 'Clinical Orientation Session' as the assignment rule cannot be used for sessions. The initial practical session is facilitated by the Physio team, ECI and IPC Nurse. Extra 'mop up' sessions are available on Clinical Orientation mornings.
